reviews.review_text: Great location. Sites are large enough to cater for big vans. Ablutions very clean and tidy. Spent a week here and despite the inclement weather enjoyed it. Would come back for sure.

Fabulous spot;friendly staff and pet friendly!
Cabin clean and well appointed.I loved it 😊

Nice park in lovely spot. Fortunately we booked in during a special, so only $37.50 pn for 2 pax. Some sites are all astro turf some have a mix of grass and something else. Amenities clean. Would love to come to Nambucca and stay here if price is right. Many parks are a rip off on east coast.
Superb location nice rooms and friendly staff and easy to check in and check out
Theft is a big problem
Great location and clean park

Beautiful views
Very clean
Excellent staff
Will definitely go again
Thank you guys
Great van park, fantastic location. Amenities always clean and very friendly staff. Can't wait to go back. Most importantly dog friendly.
Perfect location & excellent facilities! So much to do in the park for children of all ages you don’t need to leave the area, but lots to do around if you want to too!

Did a trip to Ingenia Holidays Nambucca Heads during our trip out from SA, what a place. Absolutely incredible. Stunning lagoon, beaches, rooms overlooking the water, dolphins swimming in the shallows. Definitely a bucket list place, excellent rooms and very friendly and helpful staff.
Awesome location and park

We have been travelling for 4 months and have stayed at many caravan parks and this park is the best we've been to. We're sad we have to leave tomorrow.  It wins hands down for the cleanest amenities and tidiest Park. The beaches and river are fabulous and the lake is great for kids to canoe and play in. There's lots to do for everyone.
Great place to stop for a night or two. Pet friendly.

We had an amazing stay at the park. We stayed on a powered site, so we can't comment on the rooms. However our "room"/site was amazing. We had the cool ocean breeze coming off the V wall. Close to the most amazing amenities we have seen for a camp ground. 5 star showers and bathrooms.
So close to the break wall, the hidden gems behind the camp site and the coffee van at Shelly.  beach.

Perfect spot to take the kids, dogs or just go alone. Great amenities, close to everything that we needed. A Picturesque place that os hidden off the main highway from Sydney to Brisbane.  The waterways are spectacular and straight across the road. We got a nice unit that was dog friendly and in the best location to everything. We will definitely be going back. The V wall is a perfect place to walk the dogs and the V wall pavilion was nice and close for dinner

We recently stayed here for four nights in a premium powered site. The site itself was very spacious and well presented, and the park looked tidy and well maintained. The facilities, especially the bathrooms, were wonderful — always clean, very spacious, and clearly well looked after.

The only downside for us was the laundry. It felt quite outdated and was a bit confusing to use, as some machines take $2 coins and others take $1 coins, with only some of them labelled. I had to go to the pub three separate times to get the right change, which was a little frustrating. In the end I spent around $18 trying to wash and dry one load, and even after running the dryer twice my clothes were still not completely dry.

The park is dog friendly, and they even give you little dog treats at check-in, which I thought was a really cute touch. We had originally hoped to stay in one of the waterfront cabins, but unfortunately they aren’t dog friendly, which was a little disappointing.

Overall though, we really enjoyed our stay and would definitely come back. Next time I’ll just know what to expect when it comes to the laundry

Nice place for a quiet weekend away. Food at cafes were delicious!  Absolutely loved the little beaches near by & walking along reading the painted rocks done by locals & tourist's were very impressive 🌸

An Top-Lage. Stand gleich nebenan, mit Sandbänken. Der Platz ist sehr sauber, gute Campkitchen, schönes Pool, für Kinder viele Spielmöglichkeiten. Die Damen an der Rezeption sehr nett. Gutes WLAN. Drei Waschmaschinen aber nur ein Trockner, bei Regenwetter nicht so einfach.Ds Ensuit etwas älter, aber sehr sauber. Weiter so.
Amazing park in a sensational location. One of the best I have ever stayed at. Never want to leave.

Can’t say I was impressed we asked for early checkin as we wanted to clean up before going to an event girl at check-in said it would be half hour then went back sorry another half hour then went back be 40 mins we had to be at event so couldn’t wait then when get in room no sound on tv office send someone who reset tv in morning went to have shower no hot water I ran the spar thinking that would heat up but no.
So we paid for a room with a spar that was useless Not Happy

I rang to book a cabin for 1 night - They said they would get back to me within 24 hours(a recorded message)  - not much use when I was only two hours away - I'm still waiting 27 hours later(and still counting) and still no call back. Booked room with late arrival in town and could not be happier with the service. Ingenia might learn a lesson from the Motel Mirimar!
Excellently managed park with world leading location
I would live here if I could! Absolutely loved it, such beautiful rooms with everything you need. Lots to do for kids and amazing for fishing! I will be back that's for sure 😊

Beautiful place, 10/10 customer service!! Cabins were immaculate and very well kept... All the amenities were clean and well maintained.  Staff were so friendly and extremely helpful.  Loved every minute of our stay!!
Just visiting for the day with my friend. So much to explore and see. I have return again

We had three nights with our puppies and loved it. They have thought of everything! Car wash, dog wash, fish cleaning area, great pool and water play area as well as a large amenities area with BBQs, microwave and tables near the huge jumping pillow that will keep kids entertained for hours and a small playground as well as peddle bikes for hire. The staff are super friendly and helpful.

The park is situated in an excellent location and is presented to a high standard overall. The
lakes and the v wall  loved the walks and the views so good there. The restaurant, cafe best food ever. While the facilities were excellent — the toilets and kitchen area were exceptionally clean. The staff were incredibly friendly.. BUT the pool area I found it would benefit with additional shaded areas and increased the number of lounge chairs to accommodate the volume of guest. Unfortunately the internet service was unreliable, and the TV connection was disappointing and impacted the overall quality of the stay.

Beautiful location and a great park overall, however the internet connection was extremely poor and there was no tv reception, which was disappointing.
The pool area also needs improvement- more shade and additional lounge chairs are needed to accommodate the large number of guests the park holds.

Amazing caravan park.

I haven't been here for nearly 30 years and its just as good as I remember it, if not better.

The Staff have been absolutely amazing, especially Emily and Vicky, whether it be answering painfully obvious questions, organising hire or the last minute extension of our stay and seemless transition between vans, the service has been amazing.

The park is clean and well maintained and the location is second to non.

This is my boys first stay in a caravan park, they were nervous about the experience, thankfully it was amazing, and the boys are looking forward to their next stay.

Make sure your go the V Wall Pavillion and Matilita's cafe that you will see on the way in. My fussy eaters ate the amazing fish and chips on offer.

NamBreathtaking Heads is what they should call this place!

Can’t fault this place at all, from the rooms to the staff to the facilities and location. A must on your NSW road trip

I would give this 0 stars if it was possible. We stayed in a budget cabin. No tiles under the bed, the bed is on wheels so it’s easily moved to expose the floor. Double bed, with a hard mattress. No side tables or anything to place your phone or a water bottle on. The glass door didn’t lock properly, so had to rely on the screen door. Water shoots from shower head into the ceiling, which has a lot of damage so clearly been happening a while. The bathroom also smells like a dirty drain, the exhaust fan doesn’t work and is filthy. The gas cook top has to be lit with a lighter. The fridge in the cabin wasn’t working properly and our food was cool, not cold, covered in condensation. No where to hang up your towels inside, so they have a crappy little clothes hanger behind the lounge. There was also cockroach droppings on the kitchen bench/sink and down the side of the bed on the floor. The floor was sticky when we arrived. I agree with the person who called the budget cabins “the pitts”. It’s disgusting. For almost $300 a night in the holiday season, you’d expect a clean cabin and working amenities!! These cabins are in need of some serious cleaning and need to be redone.
Great place to relax
很不错的露营地，全家玩得很开心！
Still one of the premier coastal Holiday Parks. Staff, location, amenities and sites are what one expects in a genuine Holiday destination. Peter Edgar

Best ever mibe and husband shane cabin 38 was absolutely brilliant staff awesome. Lake so good could spend all day in there. The restaurant, cafe best food ever. Recommend everyone go there. Love love love it
Well maintained park with clean amenities. We stayed on a premium site with artificial grass so it was always clean and no dragging grass, sand etc into the van. Loved that there was a cafe onsite.

Everything here is great! Amenities, pools and kids splash park, camp kitchen and overall vibes, we are here with a bunch of kids of all different ages and has done well for all accross cabins and powered sites. Only downside is the jumping pillow being turned off before 6pm, most nights we have been down in the camp kitchen like many other families with kids until 8pm and the kids (and parents ) would love/appreciate the pillow staying on longer, I can understand during the week but Friday and Saturday nights ? Please consider having the jumping pillow on until atleast 7.30-8pmish thank you.
Loved the place. Great for families and large groups. Cabins were clean but need an up grade. But they were still comfortable
Great park, excellent location, great facilities, awesome place for young kids.

A lovely holiday park with lots of beautiful views and great facilities
There is a pub with great meals at the entrance
There are a lot of cabins many of which seem to have permanent residents
Walking distance to the beach and a lagoon where many people swim and paddle water craft

Beautiful park. We had an ensuite site.
The restaurant on site is beautiful. A little fish and chips shop next door and the V Wall is amazing.

Stayed in 1 bedroom budget cabin only accommodation left.Whatever you do don’t stay in one,they are the pitts.
Everything was horrible about this cabin absolutely everything
Nice and clean
Great ensuite site. Great location.

After having a terrible experience with another park who left us with no accomodation these guys went above and beyond so we could still enjoy a couple of days in Nambucca. The park is relaxed and has an amazing location for everyone old and young. I travelled with my 2 kids aged 11 and 13 and they loved it. The cafe out front does beautiful food and there is amazing walks to do and places to enjoy a bite to eat.

We went camping with five families, including kids — a total of 22 people. The campground, swimming pool, and surrounding area were all very safe and family-friendly. The facilities were excellent — the toilets and kitchen area were exceptionally clean. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. The only suggestion would be to have a larger microwave in the kitchen. Overall, it’s a fantastic place for families to visit.
We booked a premium site which was awesome. The only let down has been that we have not had a hot shower since being here, showers have no heat at all.
Excellent place for family

A great location right next to the lake. I was slightly disappointed in the amenities, given that it cost $140 per night (water front site) the amenities were dated and often diet with one shower note working. Given the revenue this place is pulling, they could spend a little more. Over the amenities were average/Bernie average compared to like parks. Jumping pillow was popular, though a bit tatty and the camp kitchen was okay. Sites are synthetic grass and well maintained.
Great park

I been in my caravan, excellent place for family
100% I will go again

Very clean cabin  Close to the beach and walk paths.
Definitely holiday there in the future.

Having stayed here before, we knew this caravan park would not disappoint. It’s well kept with good sized sites. The camp kitchen is great and the lagoon has a lovely beach and breakwater and is a pleasant walk in either direction. A cafe and shops are accessible by a walk on a boardwalk into town. Highly recommended.
Our cabin was perfectly located but outdated, the table top trim was held together in Cabin 19 by a bandaid 🤮. Generally happy with our stay, I believe there is cabin upgrades in progress
Got away for a week for my birthday and 1st week of QLD school holidays.|Amazing location, relaxing time and facilities are awesome.
It was somewhat inconvenient that during a holiday period 3 of the limited number of washing machines were out of order.
Excellent location and facilities. We had a great cabin overlooking the lagoon and beach. Good sport for fishing too off the break wall
We stayed at the premium power site with artificial lawn. It’s very large and clean.

We have just spent 4 nights at Ingenia.
For such a big park, we were very impressed.
Super clean, well managed, and such a great position with walking paths everywhere.
We would absolutely recommend this park.
Stayed by the waterfront (lagoon) not worth it. Would not recommend the price paid for the location. Stayed on a powered site.

We booked a 2 bedroom waterfront deluxe spa cabin for $200 the night. Check in was good and organised. A car can be parked next to it as long as it’s not to big. Just before entering the cabin I already noticed a musky smell. Maybe it’s the age and waterfront location of the cabin, but I just don’t feel comfortable and wouldn’t be surprised if it’s now in all my clothing. Even opening all window and doors, this smell is stuck in there. Luckily we are just staying one night. The living room is modern furnished, everything else needs TLC. The location is fantastic, but I wouldn’t return.

Filthy dirty, cracked and peeling paint accompanied by mould on the door frames and architraves….Not sure if 1 Star is even good enough…pity as the location is beautiful….sub standard accomodation and not what the pictures on their site depict…don’t waste your money …

The staff is super attentive and kind, making all the difference since your arrival. In the reception, Gustavo is the best and he will accommodate your needs in the best way! The beds were super comfortable, as well as pillows, shower and all amenities offered. The view is amazing, with easy access to the closest city and beachfront. The check out is at 10 am, like all places in Australia and this is way too early for those enjoying vacations.
Nice clean well maintained cabins
Bedroom is small
Absolutely cracking park to stay but very big and not to much protection from the southerly winds

Second time staying here with my dog.  The staff are super friendly and helpful, cabins are spotlessly clean and well equipped.  Bed was comfortable with nice linen and shower was lovely and hot. Although it is a large park it is very quiet|The position is perfect and l enjoyed lots of lovely walks along the beach and estuary. |I will definitely return .
Big park but large sites with easy access. Spotless amenities. Great location with good walks. Would be happy to spend more time here

Van site review
Lovely park very helpful at service desk. Sites are well maintained and amenities are up to date and clean. Perfect location. My only issue is why the local shops and local markers etc are so over priced.

LOVED our stay -Kimberly chose a perfect caravan site for us upon our early arrival - all staff friendly and welcoming. Modern clean amenities. So many nature walks, pristine water, lookouts a short climb or drive away. Many people catching fish as we passed by.  Jumping Cushion and pool area for the kids.  BBQ area had microwave, kettle and a lovely seated area for groups to gather or watch the kids playing.

Spacious Caravan sites with turf/slabs or ensuite’s.  Tent sites or Cabins available Friendly,helpful staff. Very clean facilities.  Jumping cushion, pedal cars, pool etc for kids. Very clean BBQ and kitchen.  Right on the water- a true paradise!
Awesome location, very friendly service, good value and close to everything. Perfect for families.

Fantastic location but I made the mistake of assuming a cabin was just a cabin. I should have checked because the cabin we were in was old, tired, felt unclean and the bed was so uncomfortable my back is still sore. Having said that I would return but in a better cabin.
Nice place

We stayed on a premium site with our motorhome. When we arrived we had an issue with our grey water pipe reaching the drain area so when we asked if we could move forward on the neighbouring site, the staff member was very obliging and allowed us to make that change. The amenities are very impressive and very clean. We very much enjoyed our dining experiences at the V Wall Pavilion, whether be the pub or cafe. The scenery is gorgeous and the setup of the holiday park is beautiful. Highly recommended.
What an absolute hidden Gem! Pet friendly, STUNNING views! Cannot fault this place at all! Definitely one of our favorite spots.
little old but super clean and in a simply amazing location
We enjoyed our stay exploring Nambucca! The kids loved the painted rocks & waterslide.  The indoor room with a ping pong table was great when it rained.
A great place to stay with your dog

Fantastic park with lots of accommodation options. Very clean, lots of services eg dog wash bath, fish cleaning area, car washing area, swimming pool fun, big  bouncing cushion for kids, new camp kitchen and big BBQ ar area, very friendly staff.
Very small cabin, and tiny bathroom. Friendly staff. Nice location.
1st time here but won't be the last. Stayed on a premium caravan site. Well maintained area with spotless amenities. Great location.

After putting us on a site in front of the digging and concreting we were moved to an Astro turf site which was brilliant. Amenities and pool were excellent and plenty of walks and coffee shops. Highly recommend

Efficient and friendly staff at reception.
Clean and well presented cabin.
Great dog friendly park with grass enclosed courtyard for you pet, park overall was clean and well maintained

Great spot surrounded by the water - stayed in 2 bed cabin on water front - very clean and comfortable with tea/coffee supplied and Ecco friendly bathroom soaps etc. definitely stay here again and a great pub 2 minutes walk

Booked water front cabin for 3 nights.  Check in 2 pm.  Wasn’t ready until 5 ish.  Finally unload car settle in    Ready to fire up stove for dinner the lighter supplied broken.   Too late to do anything about it.  We don’t smoke so don’t carry lighters.  No cooked dinner that night.  Plug didn’t fit sink so washing up painful.  Next day was promised a lighter would be delivered to our cabin and absolutely east r necessary to buy our own.  Out all day home after dark again no lighter and nowhere to get one.   No cooked dinner that night.  Turned tv on first time didn’t work. Next day fronted the reception was given a lighter and was promised a call from management.  Still waiting.  What an absolute waist of time and money.

This is a great caravan park. Well maintained and clean. Everything works. The cafe is very reasonably priced and fantastic food and coffee. The lagoon is lots of fun for swimming and hiring kayaks and SUPs.
This place would always get great reviews unless you have an ensuite site or a slab site and it rains heavily. The drains are poorly designed with narrow pipework. The storm water blocks quickly and can flood the whole area. It doesn’t take much to flood. Our ensuite site was under 10cm of water. Some people in tents had a shocker. There has been many opportunities to resolve this with recent works.
I don’t think we will return based on this, which is disappointing.

We stayed here for 3 nights over easter.  Highly recommend this place. It has awesome facilites from the camp kitchen to the ammenties.  We were lucky enough to get a van site by the lagoon which was awesome until the wind picked up.   Soil is sandy so you need decent pegs for your awnings!  Close to the breakwall and rivers for fishing.  Great lookouts nearby and only a short drive to other tourist locations.
Very nice stay🙂, beautiful location and service. We are returning visitors, as the place is so nice.
Beautiful location great family atmosphere but unreliable for clean amenities and camp kitchen!!

Had a delightful stay at the resort during the holiday. The cabins are very clean, well appointed and you don't even have to take shampoo!! Very rare to find outside a high end hotel/motel. Affordable rates,  great facilities and proximity to local shops and the supermarket. Only downside (and reason for 4 stars and not 5) was our room wasn't ready to check into at 2pm and fellow at reception said he would message when it was. We didn't get any notificareturned at 2.45pm and he'd already forgotten who we were. Overall an easy check in/out experience though. Will definitely return in future.
Great spot for a short getaway. Easy access to town and lovely to relax by the lagoon

Was ok but that’s it. Stayed in a waterfront cabin with spa but the cabins in the pictures are not what you get in real life. Place had a  dusty and musty smell, half the lights didn’t work, most tv channels “unavailable” and batteries missing from tv remotes. Price wise, it’s not worth the $376 we paid through flight centre, felt like something that should be about $200 a night.
Overall would not recommend.
This place is great, great site cost, we were in our motorhome, the park is very clean and facilities like new. Kid & dog friendly and cafe/restaurant on site. Must visit. Brenton
Thank u 4 what the beautiful staff did 4 us comeing down from Byron Bay much better park then Byron bay we had a water view cabin and loved it staff where amazing 🙂💜

We’ve stayed here twice in last few weeks as a stop in while we’ve been travelling the east coast of Australia.
The staff are friendly, the location is great, and we loved the pool. Everything was nice and clean, and despite the rooms being slightly dated you can’t really complain as for a reasonable price you are getting a well maintained, clean, and quiet park in a beautiful location.
Thank you guys, we will definitely stay here again if we come back through.
Love the location. 👏👏

Powered sites, great location.  Pool was very relaxing and the lagoon looked inviting.  Beautiful walks along the V Wall and beaches.
A good base for day trips to Dorrigo, The Pub with No Beer, South West Rocks etc.
A very big thank you to Belinda and her amazing team for a wonderful 3 days.  The park looks great and we loved every minute.

WOW.  This caravan park was fantastic.  We had a waterfront site for our caravan which was lovely.  The sites were a nice size and a nice area at the side of the caravan that looked out onto the lake.  Bring a kayak or paddle board for the lake.  There is also a pontoon in the middle of the lake that people fish and the kids jump off.  The amenities are clean and the showers are plenty .  The laundry is good although the machines are a bit small for a family load.  A great wall/sea walk is about 2 mins away. One way goes to a small beach in a cove and the other to the front of the park where there is a pub/cafe.  We sat with our dogs out the front of the cafe at night (cafe closed) and were able to have a drink and food.   The sand bars are beautiful as is the colour of the water.  You can easily with a paddle board get out to the sand bars and have fun.  Found a few walks with the dogs, one ending up at the pub, bonus.  Woolies is only a 2 mins drive away and there are plenty of places for breakfast that also allow dogs to sit outside.  Would definitely recommend this park and will be returning in the near future.  We were on site W27.
Fabulous location!

Good park to stay at on the V Wall. Lagoon to swim and fish in and beach a short walk. Foreshore walk into town is very relaxing. Amenities and camp kitchen are clean and would definitely stay again.
Second stay. Park has had an upgrade but booking in was tedious. We didn't book but asked for availability and preferably a site not under a tree. Offered "cheapest" sites first on grass but when I enquired further about other options we were then offered a slab site. Went for a walk to inspect options and went back to the office to be informed that the site offered was not available. Questioned availability of the synthetic sites as they had no trees and they were available. Told reception we were members but online price is what we were charged so as there is no paperwork can only assume no discount was applied. Not sure why we joined the BIG 4. Still like the location, cleanliness of the park and enjoy the walks along the river, hence the 3 stars.

After discovering the appeal of Nambucca Heads a couple of years ago, we decided to make it our next adventure stop. It didn’t disappoint. We enjoyed the happy balance of family meets fun while staying at the holiday park. Facilities and accommodation are great. Location is ideal and we’re looking forward to returning.

This place is incredible! We stayed at a premium campsite, and the day we arrived, it was extremely windy. As new campers, we didn't realize the ground was very compact due to the artificial grass. The team was amazing—they immediately sent the maintenance guy, @Dan, to help us set up our tent, even though it was after hours. A huge thank you to the entire team and especially @Dan for the assistance.

Beyond that, all the facilities were excellent. The bathrooms were spacious and impeccably clean, and the kitchen was just as tidy and well-maintained. Every single detail was perfect. Highly recommended!
Cabin poor. Great location so small. No power point in bathroom. Was a pet friendly cabin. Must say very clean

Our toilet was blocked the night we got here, water ran out all over the bathroom floor and wet everything, I assumed the kids had splashed a bit however the next day the toilet didn't flush, the sinks gurgled and when I showered it wet again and smelt like sewerage!!! Our whole room stinks... The plumber came yesterday and today and it flushed fine then on showering, stank water came back up all over our clothes and towels... my husband just asked at reception  25 mins ago and nothing, it's a health hazard and now we are waiting to shower so we can leave for dinner, the laundromat only takes $1and $2 coins, reception is shut and we are left with a stinky room and wet clothes that we can't wash.... not stoked right now
Best in town lots to do Hotel on site Beautiful meals fresh and affordable
We had an amazing family holiday here. Family and dog friendly, so much to see and do, all things in walking distance and a delicious cafe! The chicken burger is amazing! Highly recommend.
It is truly The most beautiful place. Very comfortable clean cabins and pet friendly. Thanks for a relaxing lovely stopover holiday. We will be back soon.

Great location, very close to several areas to swim and relax. If caravanning take a pergola (3x3 or 6x3) and set it up alongside your awning for extra shade. There’s a salt water lake that’s perfect for paddle boards and swimming that has lots of fish as well.
Beautiful location with lovely staff! Only downfall was the certain resident that abused, swore and ripped our power out whilst trying to celebrating New Year’s Eve early in the night 😊

The location is absolutely premium, surrounded by stunning beaches, sandbanks, and a river that offers extra fun for paddling enthusiasts and boating. It’s a truly gorgeous place, and our family had a fantastic time during our stay. The other visitors at the park were also very friendly, which added to the positive experience.

Areas for improvement:
While we thoroughly enjoyed the lagoon, we felt it could benefit from better maintenance. Pruning the seaweed and improving the sand’s appearance around the lagoon would enhance its overall look and accessibility. Currently, only a few areas are free of seaweed. The photos online set high expectations, so it was a bit disappointing to see this in person.

Regarding the restaurant near the park, *The V Pavilion*, it’s a lovely spot, but it could expand its vegetarian offerings. Including more plant-based protein options instead of relying heavily on carbs would make it even better.

Overall, this place is awesome and absolutely worth a visit.

This location is outstanding. The layout of the cabins is well thought out and doesn't feel cramped. Town centre is a few minutes down the road.
This is a great place to take the family.
Beautiful park centre to all the things to see & do while visiting Nambucca Heads Highly Recommended, Welcoming staff check in & check was quick & easy. Can not wait to visit again & stay here

I have been staying here since i was a child myself, I now love to bring my own children. Such a beautiful spot and so much to do as a family around the park and within walking distance of the park. My only complaint would be that the ovens in the spa cabins need an upgrade and the pool could be a bit warmer. Great value for money though.
Stayed on a large drive through site which was level and easy to access. Staff were terrific and friendly.
Rooms were excellent. Right on the water. Granddads swam morning and all day.
A great little spit with a heap of community involvement.
Need to go back, the weather was crap!
The cabin was really clean. The location great. We only stayed 2 nights. Walked along the beach. Beautiful Location
Very much enjoyed the v wall walk
Excellent well presented and maintained will definitely be returning 😀
Great location  for  a  caravan park.  Office staff very helpful on arrival.  Ground staff member  helped direct our van on to site without fuss. Ta
Didn't stay at the park but the location definitely is stunning with all facilities in close proximity.
It's lovely out of the way park. Walking distance of shops and close to beach.

Very neat and tidy, very comfortable.
Excellent location f
or a wedding held at 🦅 Eagle Rise .
Saw whales from the lookout but they didn't breach while I was watching, just waved and saw the air from their blow hole.
RSL was great too.
Great experience all round.

We felt like this place had everything. That everything was thought of. We stayed in a 3bed cabin on the lagoon and it was just beautiful. Both bathrooms had shampoo, conditioner, body wash, hand wash. All the rooms had fans or air con. The kitchen had everything you could need. There were boxes of tissues. Biscuit, hot chocolate. The amenities in the park were top notch. We honestly couldn’t believe how good this place and can’t wait to go back.
First time there, dank room, the pub next door  was great
Great holiday place, especially if you have kids
A fabulous family holiday with so much to see and do. Staff who are friendly, polite and professional. The perfect stay for families. Cant wait to return

We had an amazing 4 days stay! The park was incredible, plenty to do. The kids loved the pool, bikes to hire and the bounce pillow. Such a relaxed and happy atmosphere. Ample fishing and gorgeous beaches surround the place. The staff were lovely and our room was superb. We will be back!
Stunning park to enjoy your holiday✨️

Powered Van Site , Travelling with friends and neither of us could fault this Park , Clean and very well run and maintained , Site was large and level , Great position with easy walks around the foreshore with a 2 Klms walk into town that has a steep climb , Park lagoon looks amazing of a night , Definitely be back , Well done Guys 👍

Our family has had the best 2 days here at Nambucca Heads. We stayed in one of the Lake View cabins. There is heaps to do with the kids. Our little ones has loved playing on the jumping castle, play ground and the water play area. It's been a very relaxing experience. Would stay again if in the area.

The location is awesome right on the mouth of the river.
Great places to walk and watch the ocean plus the odd whale.

Needed a place to stop the night from an 8hr drive. The staff were friendly and helpful.  Got a great spot on the water. Member of the Big4 and got a seniors discount. Food was great at the pub near yhe entrance.

We walked by this facility. It is in a top spot with wonderful facilities. Cabins, motel style rooms, camping, pool, water playground and a lagoon. It's on the edge of the most beautiful l estuary, the confluence of Nambucca River and Warrell Creek. Recreation fishing and a beautifully maintained park nearby for picnics. There's a cafe and Restaurant nearby. Lots of walks including one over to Shelley Beach once it won a award as the  8th most beautiful beach in Australia. You can walk for miles on the uncrowded silky sand. Swim at Shelley or onto main beach Surf Club. Beautiful views everywhere.

Can't really fault. Weather was horrible but reverse air con and heat lamp in cabin were appreciated. Two story cabins are plush and well appointed. Excellent fit out only issue was glass were was opaque and possibly damaged. Very good stay all round. Pavilion was good for dinner as there are no delivery options.
Beautiful sea view, best place to unwind
Great location , great park
Fantastic caravan Park and Fantastic staff
Our powered site was perfect  we will be back for sure.
Great spot for caravans with new astro turf sites ,good amenities
Communication could be better. But in saying that there is now a new manager and she is slowly building the park up and it is beautiful. Pet friendly too.

Had a premium water front caravan site. Well maintained facilities, super clean and convenient. Close to great walking tracks and the breakwall. Shops a few minutes away, coffee shops all along the walk.

Cabins are getting a bit tired. Despite the fact that prices are ramping up 2 years ago stayed for $1,600 for the week, now being quoted $3,000 (same week before Boxing Day) there seems to be no maintenance on the cabins beyond broken.

Fans tick, flyscreens damaged, dangerously even missing lightbulbs...

Amenities (esp Washing Machines) are frequently out of order.

Things are mouldy, dirty in places, need a paint. All that said the park is in one of the best locations in Australia and the staff are great. That's what we love about Nambucca.

Not sure if after 20 almost continuous years there, that we'll head back this year... Hope it changes...
Wonderful situation, great facilities, good service.
Paramos apenas para almoçar, local agradável com uma linda vista para o mar.

Our intention for staying here was that we had stayed in merry beach and kiama with ingenia and big 4 holiday parks previously and cabins always exceeded expectations.

We arrived late afternoon and booked into a 1 bedroom cabin on the lagoon.  Cabin was small and outdated but clean.
For this time of year I felt it was overpriced for what was on offer.

Very little available in the kitchen for cooking and what was available was in very used condition.

The ladies in reception were welcoming and very accommodating.

View spectacular wild life and area beautiful.

Self contained, good fridge, microwave gas oven/ cooktop, TV lots of power points in every room, double bed( not much space on one side) clean good shower and toilet.
Everything worked, clean unit, quite (apart from some noise from the pool) which was okay. Will probably stay there again. The car space is a bit small my Ute is 5.4 m and just fitted.
Close to the sea wall, nice location, but 1.5 to 2 km from town, but nice walk during the day. Get the couerticy bus from the RSL  club or walk back on the road....no lights along the water front....

The White Albatross is a wonderful holiday park, magnificent location and great amenities. The hidden gem is the menu and wine list at the associated V Wall Tavern. Such quality food and innovative dishes you can't usually find in a regional town. It's a credit to the management that they obviously have hired a fabulous chef!

5/5. We had an absolutely perfect stay. Our cabin location was amazing. Facing the lagoon. Enjoyed sitting out on the deck enjoying the sound of the waves of the ocean. Weather was perfect to have our meals outside. Loved the pool. The park was very well maintained. Facilities were great. Hope to stay again in the near future.

Great reception  service as we were a walk in . Got last available  cabin on the lake. Very clean and tidy lovely park . Thank you and restaurant  was amazing  at the front of the park. Would recommend  booking a table gets very busy

My second time here and this time with a cabin experience. What didn’t change is the exceptional service provided. The accommodation was quite clean, comfortable, and well-equipped, catering to all needs. The staff are friendly and go out of their way to ensure guests have a memorable experience. The facilities, including the pool and BBQ areas, are top-notch. An ideal getaway for families and couples alike. Five stars without hesitation!

Hope to revisit in summer!

Previously reviewed:
Very well maintained, pet friendly space - the checkin and checkout experience were smooth. The staff were helpful and friendly

What’s outstanding:
The location - access to beach , lake and the pool

Clean kitchen

What could be improved:
Washroom cleaning during the busy holiday season - it was clean when it was due but not so during the day

Extended jumping area timing, it was closed around 5 where as sunsets at 8 and opens at 8-9ish (which is late)

Some guardrails from public access near the “I” sites for security

Overall:
We had a wonderful time with family, couldn’t ask for more - thank-you and definitely, I ll look forward to come back or to recommend to friends and family

The park was amazing to stay at, the artificial grass site we stayed on was a brilliant idea and site, the facilities within the park are above standard, I really couldn't think of anything that it didn't have, the toddlers and teens we have had a great time at the park and thoroughly enjoyed the jumping pillow, pool, hire trike and swimming in the lagoon. The camp kitchen was very well fitted out and clean. Our dog was well catered for. The staff went above and beyond to help in any way possible. I will return and recommend this park to those with children

What a great spot, a hop ,skip and a jump from the beach (which was beautiful and basically deserted) and right on the break wall and lake.
One of the best sunsets I've ever seen as well.

What a sweet corner of the world! Beautiful non chlorinated pool 🙌 walking distance to beaches, restaurants and everything you need 👍🌊 unfortunately not great beds in the second  room :/ or would have been 5 stars.

Always a thoroughly enjoyable experience staying at this park. The service and quality of the facilities is outstanding.
Special mention to Steve, the grounds keeper. A guy who goes above and beyond and is extremely generous with his time and sharing his knowledge. An asset to the park and we have loved chatting to him each time we have stayed.

Absolutely Awesome park.   Lots to do.
Fishing, walking, lookouts, bikes, etc.
Friendly staff.

Two of us stayed at Ingenia Holidays in Nambucca Heads. Conveniently located near the water and the famous ‘V wall’, this holiday park is in a beautiful location. Like most coastal town caravan parks, even unpowered sites are quite expensive so be aware of that. Nevertheless, the park is maintained well and has all the essential amenities required for a comfortable stay.
I was impressed with the amenities they were immaculate. I still haven't found a caravan park that comes up to your standard.
Should have let us know about the construction site 3 meters from bedrooms. 8am -5pm was not just loud, but the whole apartment shook. Holiday totally ruined.
Visited my Dad here, nice looking park. Upgrades are very nice. Great location.
Cabins where clean. The double bed was really small. No fan in the main bedroom.

A wonderful location and lovely cabin ruined by cockroaches, a really musty smell, and poor service. The staff are friendly but their answers to our questions were inconsistent and/or inaccurate. We stayed as part of a group for 8 nights and didn’t receive a room service over that period despite promises we would. Pricing was inconsistent for the group  and it seems that they’ve done nothing to improve things given other reviews. Save yourselves the frustration and stay in beautiful other locations nearby.
Haven't stayed there but hear its good. Close to beach,fishing,V Wall tavern and kiosk, another magic day there

Just wanted to write this review as our last stay which unfortunately couldn’t be extended tonight being our anniversary, we had to che n out this morning. We spent the last 10 days in pet friendly rooms as I was moved twice as we extended at short notice. Every room was perfect, Tracey & her team in reception did so much to try to accommodate us & at short notice always did. This park looks absolutely amazing, this is a place I exchanged my vows this time last year & is very special to both my husband & I. The new management is amazing at the albatross, I have heard nothing but good things & you just look around see the place is such a nice place to stay. I just like to thank the office staff for all there help & all three rooms were amazing. We will return again. I recommend Ingenia White Albatross to anyone looking to stay in Nambucca heads, the new manager has made a huge difference & was very professional & nice to see that she was out in the park talking to holiday makers, residents. Thankyou to Belinda & Tracey for going above & beyond to try to accommodate us on this day, I’ll book in advance next time. We will be back .

We’ve been to Ingenia White Albatross twice now. Its location at the mouth of the Nambucca River is spectacular. On both occasions we’ve set up our camper trailer on site I45. We like the spot because it’s less crowded than the sites up around the lagoon but unfortunately, on both occasions, we’ve had to put up with the constant smell of cigarette smoke from the permanent resident directly across the road. We go camping to enjoy the outdoors and fresh air. So, while it’s a lovely park with great amenities and location, not sure we’ll consider returning.
Absolutely amazing location, accommodation, facilities and value. A real find! Our two room cabin had everything we needed.
Been coming here since I was little, and stayed as an over nighter with my partner on our trip north. Cant wait to bring my kids here next holidays
Absolutely awesome spot to come. It's nice waking up to the sound of the ocean. Facilities are absolutely fantastic.  They are so clean. Staff very friendly and helpful. Keep up the good work.

Great location but very cramped site for a caravan that was very hot due to the removal of shade trees and new synthetic turf being laid. There was just no relief. Also very expensive for a powered site at $200 a night.
We stopped by for a look around, but this park looks fantastic. Close to ocean and safe wading lagoons.
Love this caravan park.  Location is brilliant.  Park and facilities are very clean.  Would love to go back there again.
Nambucca Heads has to be the most beautiful spot on the East Coast. Come and see where the river meets the Sea. 🐬🐬

We stayed in our Motorhome with a group of 19 family members spread around the park.
Beautiful place to stay.
Good amenities, kept clean.
Good helpful staff.
Bit expensive but worth paying extra for it.
A dream location to stay
Great location and good amenities. Will be back soon.
Wonderful location great staff.

We were booked from 23-27th Dec 2023 White Albatross Caravan Park, 4 nights, Nambucca Heads. Only stayed 1! Despite Reception knowing the size of our van, older van, site of length was ok, but  the width totally unsuitable for a full van. A privacy screening wall had been erected to separate on-site permanent residences and there was a tap next to the wall on the site allocated to us. The tap and the wall took away from the site width, site N12, check beforehand,  if you're ever given this site. Even so, there was no room to be able to hook up your power-another issue, where the power block was several metres away from the site. Also, no room to hook up waste hose and water hose unless the van was parked half way across the slab- not suitable. After complaining and maintenance had seen the situation, we were upgraded to a larger waterfront site but at no time were we told we could only be on it for 1 night. The next day in the middle of a thunderstorm, reception telephoned to say we had to move as people were waiting to come onto the site! WHAT! Again, maintenance came to listen to our story, not their fault. In the end we were offered another site in a middle section of the park. After a visit from head of reception, who insisted we had been told to go to a different site and was trying to hurry us up, we were by now at our wits end. We felt we couldn't stay there any longer, so we decided to move on and requested a refund. We have stayed here before in cabins with no issues and love the location of the park but now definitely will never be going back. Obviously there needs to be better management and better communication between reception. This was meant to be a few days away with family for Christmas, who we hadn't seen for 12 years. Now,  a Christmas we'll remember  for all the wrong reasons.
Great cabin. Had everything we wanted. Amazing park.....caters for the kids. Absolutely amazing spot to be situated.....right on the heads. Spectacular!!!

Very nice place, very well localized. The Nambucca Heads is wonderful beach. Good rooms very well decorated. The place looked cleaned as well. We needed to check in late and we were attended to promptly and with great care.

Great location and it has a water play and medium size swimming pool enough for children to happily play.
Beds and pillows were not comfortable though, and we had cracks in the floor skirting that allowed small cockroach and ants to go into the bedroom

Last night (18-Dec-2023) I stayed one night in a 1 BR Waterfront Cabin at Ingenia Holidays White Albatross, Nambucca Heads.
I am a solo traveler and this style of accommodation is not my normal choice, as it is more suited to a family (a couple with 1 or 2 young children).
The check-in was fast and smooth, with many helpful instructions and dining suggestions from the staff.
This cabin was right on the edge of the lagoon, with a lovely verandah overlooking the water. The cabin had a n ample sized lounge/ living/ kitchen area as you enter. There was a large refrigerator and most kitchen features/ utensils that you could want, including a cook-top, an oven, plus a microwave.
The next room had 2 bunks beds and the compact bathroom.
This area is used to walk through to access the main bedroom, which contained a queen size bed, some wardrobes/ cupboards and shelves. This room was fairly small, and the AC from the living area had no effect back there. Luckily it wasn't very hot.
My cabin had two garbage bins outside the bedroom, and this was a source of noise up until about 9:00pm as people let the lids slam closed after depositing their garbage.
This is a lovely camping resort in a beautiful location. The are plenty of water sport activities, including fishing, paddling, snorkeling and swimming.

Very comfortable cabin in a great location at a reasonable price.
We actually had a quite minor problem with our cabin on arrival and the maintenance manager arrived in minutes. To avoid discomfort or disturbance the staff immediately upgraded us to a better cabin. We were delighted by the standard of service the staff provided.
Stayed one night in a 2bd cabin lake view and was a great stopover with many things to keep the kids occupied.
Caravan site

We stayed 4 nights for the first time in this park, but we look forward to returning very soon. Fantastic park and we stayed in an ensuite caravan site. Very clean amenities and great staff. It is a perfect location for scenery and beaches with aqua blue water. A short walk through the track or a short drive will also take you to shelly beach, great, safe swimming spot. We really loved our time here. As we don't connect to wifi in caravan parks for safety sake, the only draw back is the poor phone and tv reception, however, everything else out ways that easily. Located right on the breakwall and foreshore walk with it's own lagoon you cant go wrong. V-wall coffee shop and V-wall pavilion bar/restaurant is located at the front of the park with amazing views (Great for a drink in the bar at happy hour 😃).
Highly recommend Ingenia White Albatross.

This was a Caravan Park .  The surroundings were great . But after the office closed there was no one left onsite . Some guy who is on call and  lives off site comes around at 10pm   he said  BUT the last night of our stay two lots had a party  it was still going at midnight. So must have weekends off. major work also going on  noise .  Needs onsite staff after hours. DID NOT FEEL SAFE AT NIGHT.
Great location. Peaceful and relaxing. Will definitely be back.

The park itself is beautiful and very clean with an amazing location.

A great pity since the treatment, we as a party of 6 (2 motorhomes, 1 cabin) we received was disgraceful. Our reservation and site request of many months prior was completely dishonoured, which meant we were separated from our 2 mates in the cabin. And worth noting that at the time of making our reservation, we actually wanted an earlier November date to celebrate a birthday but as these dates were not available, we were assured a later date would ensure that we would definitely all be situated side by side.

Additionally, to add insult to injury, we were then subjected to 2.5 days out of our 4 day stay to the unbearable noise from the adjacent landscaping works - bobcats, whackerpackers, steamroller, trucks dumping etc from approx 8am until sundown. The works were virtually in front of our camp sites and made for sitting outside impossible. We totally understand the need for parks to occasionally undergo upgrades, BUT to offer zero compensation for sites of $75 per day is unforgivable.
Particularly galling were these two issues, and since we had all travelled from two states to hook-up for this much anticipated reunion, none of us will probably ever stay at the White Albatross again. This management arrogance is disgraceful.
Great location for a holiday with the kids

nice view near the seawall,clean roomy two bedroom cabin
Restaurant 150 mtrs from room
Relaxing holiday will definitely be returning.

Very disappointing, noisy workmen in the morning one metre way on otherside bedroom wall.  Vanity and shower taps dripping entire time.  Bedhead on blocks of wood and paint off doors and walls. Water turned off without warning.  Location not very nice.
I have stayed here many times and I just love the atmosphere of the place
Top place with friendly staff and campers...

Very accommodating with great facilities, especially for the kids.
Great location close to everything you need.

Was placed in possibly the worst site in the park for a trailer, was given a grassed site instead of an advertised pad. If I wanted to listen to frogs all night instead of the ocean, I would have stayed near a creek.
Perfect week away
Need to look at cabin amenities some work needs to be done to fix things up when it costs a lot to stay here
Great location . lots of flat walking but also some hills if you choose to walk to the headlands.
Great place to stay very friendly staff and very helpful.
Great spot, beautiful location.

Beautiful spot
Centralised location
Clean ammenities
Good security measures
Perfect for all family types!
This was the site for a family reunion. Fantastic!
My husband and I first discovered White Albatross many years ago with our caravan and always loved it.  I am now widowed and  now love staying in the cabins.
They accomodated my request with a drive through site so I did not have to un hitch van for one night stay. Very grateful for that. Coild not speak more highly of staff.
Beautiful view from our waterfront site
Great spot with lots of family friendly facilities.

Great place watched the     whales. Lots of walking tracks. Kakak or board lagoon . 3 wheel tricyle for adults and kids to hire. Great amenities. Plenty of room for van. Jumping mat for kids . Good camp kitchen.
Beautiful spot thoroughly recommend.
Awesome location. We were a disappointed that the beaches/waterways in walking distance were not dog friendly.

We loved our couple of days at white albatross so much we’re already planning our return trip. It’s the perfect spot to recharge and relax. The location is gorgeous, with plenty to do within walking distance and or an easy drive. The park and the accommodation is clean and comfortable. Staff are friendly and helpful. We can’t wait to come back!
Only thing to criticize was that the fridge was turned off and we didn't realize for several hrs after arrival.
Its an awesome location and great spot to be able to bring pets to stay with its own little backyard. Nice and quiet and great nights sleep
Absolutely Top location. Near the beach, near the lagoon, near  playgrounds. We loved it!

Beautiful position.  Reception staff need to be skilled in understanding which route long caravans need to follow to access their site. We were I  row D and sent down the last road. There was no way we could access the site from that road and had to turn around so we could come in from the opposite end. No easy feat with  children everywhere
One of the best getway place in midcoast. Awesome location. Plenty of activities.
Park is great but my only gripe is they have a jumping pillow that switches off before 5pm....why would you do that when there is hours of play still available during daylight savings?

It was a fantastic place for a holiday with friends and family. It was quiet, with plenty of fresh air, a kids' play area, nice and tidy rooms, a children's swimming pool, and a park. My kid is asking to stay longer, and I wish I could plan a whole week there next time
Super friendly helpful staff, amazing location & great clean amenities. Highly recommend 😊
What a fabulous week away

Great location, beautiful little beaches, lovely walks.  For those who like to walk, you can walk to the supermarket and RSL club and also Shelley Beach and Main beach.  Lovely cafe at the front of the park which also sells some basics.  Nice little tavern adjoining cafe.  Great pool and water area for kids.  Good camp kitchen.  Lovely staff.

Have been coming here for many years. Amazing location, great tavern with exceptional food especially if you are Coeliac. All staff friendly and accommodating. Nothing is ever too much trouble. Love it here.
Great spot, bunk bed mattress need replacing i think they are so thin
Arrived late, they helped without fuss. Views are amazing, facilities are great, I'll be back for sure!
Absolutely love this place - great park, great environment, great facilities and friendly staff would rate it a ten if I could
This is an amazing family park with jumping pad, playground, beach, fiahing, kayaking, river and lagoon all on your door step. The park is also dog friendly.
a Super place to have a holiday. Views fantastic, staff excellent, accommodation first class, basically every thing was a wonderful  experience.
Nice campsite. Good facilities and kid friendly. Beautiful location next to the lagoon.

Got given a cabin right next to the reception and the check in bay so had non stop slamming of doors and noisey kids every time someone came to check in, the cabin was extremely dated, appliances where older then me, the fridge was rusted I did not fit in the bed and the mattress was less comfortable then the ground, the sooner supplied may as well of been a doubled over sheet, extremely disappointed especially with the photos on the website

Excellent Caravan/Cabin park, in a beautiful location.  Staff are 1st class, our cabin was more than we expected for an overnight stay.  We are returning customers and recommend White Albatross to all.
Good for stay
GReat Staff, pet friendly and Beautiful location
Great place for a relax.
Beautiful park and perfect location, close to shopping and clubs
Won't go again.

Over the years we have stayed a few times. This time we stayed in a waterfront cabin. It is one of the best locations you can stay. It was advertised as sleeps 4 and that is true as long as 2 of you are 165cm (5’6”) or shorter. 2 very small beds in a hall way.

Wi-Fi was good. Location great. It is starting to feel more like a commercial enterprise than the charming place we used to stay.
Mick the care taker and all of the maintenance men need a raise. They are all so friendly and more then willing to help.
Great park

Loved our stay. Unit good, staff very friendly and helpful.
Favourite place on the Mid North Coast.
Found, this year however,  has become very (?too) expensive for us and the $15 per night surcharge for our toy poodle meant we had to take a shorter stay. Can we afford to stay again ????? Would understand a one-off charge or even a bond would be fair but a nightly charge for an extended stay is unreasonable and unjustified as cleaning/service is not done daily.
Great location and caravan park

This is a beautiful holiday park. You cannot beat the location. They have many different types of accommodation.  I recommend a lakeside cabin. It is very picturesque.
They have restaurant/bar with great meals and entertainment.
Easy access to the beach and V-Wall.
Clean and well maintained.
An absolutely beautiful and peaceful spot right on the water. We loved the beach, inlet, board walks, shops and food available on-site. The whales at the end of the V-Wall were an added bonus!
Great location, friendly staff, clean unit
Great room, location and staff.
Beautiful open spaces. Dog friendly, view was amazing. rooms were very clean the bed was comfortable. we will be back definetly

What a wonderful place for families ! Thank you for your great communication whilst booking, your care on arrival and the beautiful venue. How amazing to have beautiful places to walk and visit just near your cabin . Highly recommend the tavern! Will come again !
Great location , friendly and helpful staff, the bar and bistro was absolutely amazing , the food and staff were  amazing
Beautiful location, great family get away anv have booked in again.
Great location and very friendly helpful staff. Clean and appointed cabins.

Accommodation was very small & a little tired. Photo’s on web site very misleading re: sizing & layouts. Bedroom very cramped, hardly any room to walk around in, no room for personal belongings which one would need @ a bedside. No place for suitcases etc … we ended up using the kitchen table which then limited space/activity in that area. Small sink in bathroom useless (ended up using kitchen sink). Cabin smelt old/damp, sliding door to bathroom in poor condition. As we were only staying x1 night decided to make do. However from our experience walking around the park feel there was more to offer with perhaps us making a different decision should the internet information would have been more clearer. We would like to return sometime in the future …How can we get more accurate information ?
great stay. Clean kitchen and bathroom. Has all thats needed for a great stay. would definately return.
Roomy cabin right on the lagoon. Really enjoyed our stay. Took the paddle boat out and fished.
Love the location, pet friendly rooms, Cleanliness of rooms is excellent. Staff extremely helpful. Our second trip staying here. Will rebook again.
Good location but we were disappointed with our site. Very dusty with no grass.

We've stayed here a few times. It's a great location with easy access to breakwall and walking paths along the river.
Unfortunately is in a shadow for mobile phone and tv reception. Can live without tv but phone is needed.
Water view cabins are really nice location.
Well presented, friendly staff, lots to do for children, pet friendly what can I say it's right on the beach.
What a lovely place to stay.  We will visit again.
Excellent
We stayed on a powered site in our camper, location is ideal and from moment we arrived staff were helpful & cheerful, a real credit to this park! Awesome!
Location is the thing at White Albatross what could be better than walking to the end of the V Wall and see a large pod of porpoise playing in the waves. Beautiful!
Lovely park,great location

Great spot for our van. We could have taken an ensuite site but opted for a waterfront view. It is just of a large lake, but it is quite serene. You can use it for swimming or SUP activities, and there is a pontoon in the middle if you want to swim out and sunbake (you would have to share with the family of pelicans that take up residence there every afternoon for a nap...). Right behind the lagoon is a rockwall and path, and behind that is the ocean and inlet, the sounds of which easily make it to the park. This makes for a very sound sleep, with the rolling of the waves gently sender you off to slumber.

Most sites have either concrete or matting so very stable and clean.

The amenities block is great too, very clean, and very large.

Town is a short drive up a somewhat steep road, but nothing challenging - people get their caravans down there easily, so it wont be a problem.

We also had lunch at the cafe on site, and the food was great with very reasonable prices.

This park is great and you wont be disappointed if you stay here. If you are happy with the sound of the ocean, you have to get a site on the lagoon.
Awesome location, spacious cabins. Beds were quite uncomfortable though
Ok
Very relaxing pet friendly accomodation. I’ll be back!
Always beautiful, we just can't help but return.
Exceptionally friendly staff and easy checkin. Cabin very clean. Great location. V wall tavern on site was excellent value for meals and drinks. Would recommend staying here.

Very cold and really really small budget cabin no insulation because of noise restrictions didn't know you still could have the aircon on during the night so froze. Really hard to get out of bed because no room to stand curtains didn't block light. Appliances and furniture cheap and nasty. Don't waste your money!!
Just sound of the ocean is the best

If your looking for an overnight stay between Brisbane or Sydney don't waste your money at these budget cabins absolutely waste of money, time and peace of mind. Budget cabins so uncomfortable especially during the cold months just like living in a fridge no insulation whatsoever  probably warmer in your car. And I cannot believe it this cabin was right next to the maintenance shed look out kitchen window and see maintenance equipment and maintenance men talking at 7am and blocking the carapace why have guests staying in this situation. Cabin it's self so basic should of been $50 not $100 per night.

Parked our camper trailer on a waterfront site. Very roomy with nice, clean amenities and a great outlook over the lagoon. A short walk to a picturesque headland and estuary. We'll be back soon to explore further in the canoe.
Great aspect next to river and ocean, refreshments next door, sit and relax go for walk
How does it get better than staying on the edge of the lagoon within the Ingenia Holidays White Albatross Holiday Park. Simply incredible.
great location; excellent friendly service; will definitely go there again
